description: wave-2 spine port for the 'product_type' taxonomy vocabulary ("Product type") on kernel v1.3 + the shared taxonomy-vocabulary store. Pure vocabulary shell: the module adds no fields/values/measures (partition vocab_new 0). Term hierarchy (parent/children) is a core-taxonomy fold not introduced by this module and is a declared gap, not implemented here — see punts.jsonl (b-shared-1).
